title: Migrate a hardcoded secret into a vault
description: Move a credential out of source into a secret manager, update the code to fetch it at runtime, and rotate the exposed value.
body: Use when a secret is found hardcoded and must be relocated. Do not simply move it to another tracked file. Actions: store the credential in the secret manager with scoped access; change the code to fetch it at runtime; remove it from source and gitignore the path; rotate the value since it was exposed; scrub history after rotation. Validation signals include the app resolving the secret from the manager and a scan finding none in the tree. Risk boundary: because the value was in source it is compromised, so rotation is mandatory and you must escalate the exposure rather than only relocating it.
